title: Student Activities: Travel
description: Conroe ISD's travel policy for student activities sets the rules for how students are transported and supervised when traveling for school-sponsored events such as field trips, athletic competitions, and other extracurricular activities. It outlines expectations for chaperones, approved transportation methods, and student conduct while traveling on behalf of the district. Parents and students can refer to this policy to understand the safety standards and responsibilities that apply whenever students travel as part of a school program.
